brute_force.name: Brute Force Response Playbook
brute_force.description: Response actions for brute force / credential stuffing attacks

actions.label: Phone Verification
actions.reason_template: Verify identity of {username} via registered phone number before taking containment actions.

actions.label: Soft Lock Account
actions.reason_template: Temporarily lock {username}'s account to prevent further unauthorized access from {src_ip}.

actions.label: Block Source IP
actions.reason_template: Block {src_ip} at perimeter firewall. IP identified as {ip_context}.

actions.label: Isolate Host
actions.reason_template: Network-isolate {asset_id} ({hostname}) to prevent lateral movement. Asset criticality: {criticality}.
